Meaning.Vi: Nút chai (thường làm từ vỏ cây sồi); nút bần
Meaning.En: A stopper, typically made of cork, used to seal bottles, especially wine bottles.
Meaning.Example: She pulled the cork out of the wine bottle with a satisfying pop.

Situation.Vi: Thao tác mở chai rượu vang bằng cách rút nút bần.
Situation.En: The act of removing a wine bottle’s cork, often with a corkscrew.

Situation.Vi: Vật liệu làm nút chai tự nhiên, thu hoạch từ vỏ cây sồi.
Situation.En: Natural, lightweight, elastic material harvested from the bark of the cork oak tree.

Meaning.Vi: Đóng nút (chai); bịt kín bằng nút bần
Meaning.En: To close or seal (a bottle) with a cork.
Meaning.Example: The sommelier corked the bottle again after tasting the wine.

Situation.Vi: Hành động đóng nút chai sau khi đã rót rượu.
Situation.En: The action of resealing a bottle after sampling its contents.
